holdings.infoBox: PABU is an equity ETF with a total of 96 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.26%, Apple at 6.68%, Microsoft at 6.09%, Alphabet at 4.19%, and Broadcom at 3.89%.

overview.description: The iShares Paris-Aligned Climate Optimized MSCI USA ETF (PABU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of tier-weighted US large- and mid-cap stocks selected and weighted based on ESG criteria that is compatible with the Paris Climate Agreement and carbon reduction goals. PABU was launched on Feb 8, 2022 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Climate Paris Aligned Benchmark Extended Select PAB Index
